concerns.text: T020 'Add validation for class imbalance ratios >10:1 and apply stratified balancing before metric calculation' does not specify which file (02_preprocessing.py or 04_fairness_metrics.py) should contain this logic. Implementer cannot execute deterministically without knowing the target file.

T029 'Document fairness metric formulas per Appendix A in utils/metrics.py' is vague about documentation format. Should formulas be in docstrings, comments, or a separate section? Specify exact location and format.
T039 'Document mathematical dependencies: exclude DP-difference vs DI-ratio pairs' does not specify WHERE to document (code comments, CSV metadata, separate doc). Implementer needs explicit location.

T042 'Document effect size bounds and acknowledge n=5 dataset limitation in regression output' does not specify output format (CSV column, separate report, code comment). Needs concrete deliverable location.

T043 'Include interpretation note acknowledging theoretical relationship between base rate difference and demographic parity difference' does not specify WHERE to include this note (regression output file, console, documentation).

T054 'Review all documentation for prescriptive language and replace with associational framing' is a review task without concrete deliverable. Specify which files to review and how to verify completion.
T056 'Document associational framing in code/ comments and documentation' is vague about WHERE to add comments. Specify exact files and comment locations.
T058 'Code cleanup and refactoring across all modules' is too coarse. What cleanup? What refactoring? This triggers atomizer splitting downstream.
T059 'Performance optimization for bootstrap resampling within 6-hour GHA job window' is too coarse. Specify which optimization (iteration reduction, parallelization, algorithm change).
T061 'Security hardening for dataset download URLs (validate against canonical sources)' is vague. Specify validation mechanism (whitelist, hash verification, domain check).
T062 'Run quickstart.md validation to verify end-to-end pipeline execution' is a verification task without implementation action. Specify what to do if validation fails.
T063 'Verify all FR/SC coverage matrix items are implemented' is a verification task, not implementation. Specify how to generate/verify the coverage matrix.

T064 'Document power analysis limitations... in research.md' assumes research.md exists. The plan shows research.md as Phase 0 output but tasks.md is Phase 2. Verify research.md exists before this task or specify creation.
T065 'Verify dataset URLs are stable and accessible' is a verification task without implementation action. Specify how to verify (curl test, HTTP status check) and where to record results.

T066 'Add error handling for non-convergence in regression models with fallback to reduced predictor set' does not specify WHERE to add error handling (06_regression_analysis.py). Needs file location.
